reviews.feedback:
Created .obsidian/daily-notes.json with folder set to Calendar/Daily
The actual file at ~/obsidian/BrainFrame/.obsidian/daily-notes.json contains '"folder": "Notes/Daily"', not 'Calendar/Daily'. The output snapshot (daily_notes_config.json) shows the correct value, but it does not reflect what was actually written to disk — the real file diverges, likely because Obsidian rewrote it after the vault was opened.

We must fix this issue.
Clearly, you thought the skill wasn't very good.
